title: lithocarpus attenuatus
intro: Lithocarpus attenuatus, also known as the California Nutmeg, is a deciduous tree native to the western United States. The medicinal properties of Lithocarpus attenuatus include its antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antispasmodic properties, which can be used to treat various health conditions. The health benefits of this plant include reducing fever, relieving pain, and soothing digestive issues, as well as its potential to lower blood pressure and cholesterol levels. Lithocarpus attenuatus can be prepared into herbal teas, tinctures, or infusions, and its bark, leaves, and seeds are commonly used in traditional herbal medicine.
